registry_scope: Admissible-Existence subject repositories mirrored as formalism records.
authority_boundary: This registry mirrors and classifies formalism records from Admissible-Existence subject repositories. It does not create source authority, proof authority, execution authority, continuity standing, or admissibility standing.

records.name: STCM
records.purpose: Mirror the STCM subject formalism for public comparison, crosswalk, and convergence review.
non_claims: Wiki mirroring does not make STCM a StegVerse source authority.
Wiki mirroring does not prove or validate STCM claims.

records.name: RTG
records.purpose: Mirror public-safe metadata for the RTG subject formalism once source boundary and publishable scope are confirmed.
non_claims: Wiki mirroring must not expose private RTG source content.
Wiki mirroring does not prove or validate RTG claims.
